caption: A woman with braided hair and headphones sits in a podcast studio, wearing a dark green t-shirt featuring a red circular graphic. She is positioned in front of a professional black microphone on a boom arm. Behind her is a black backdrop and a framed screen displaying the text "BESS TALK IT OUT," "It's A Unique Hustle," and "PODCAST." To the right of the backdrop, the text "About It!" is visible. In the foreground, there are small branded signs that read "BESS TALK IT OUT." As the sequence progresses, the woman speaks and shifts her expression, moving from a focused look with her mouth slightly open to a smile and a soft laugh. Her head tilts slightly as she interacts with someone off-screen, maintaining her position in the studio throughout the clip.
